mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ideology_calculate_paper ( paper_id, classroom_id, test_id, course_name, classroom_name, paper_name, test_name, catelog, creator, create_time, `row` ) VALUES
( #{item.paperId}, #{item.classroomId}, #{item.testId}, #{item.courseName}, #{item.classroomName}, #{item.paperName}, #{item.testName}, #{item.catelog}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.row} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, paper_id as paperId, classroom_id as classroomId, test_id as testId, course_name as courseName, classroom_name as classroomName, paper_name as paperName, test_name as testName, catelog, creator, create_time as createTime, `row` FROM ideology_calculate_paper WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId} Order By `row`
SELECT MAX(`row`) FROM ideology_calculate_paper WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}
